author: Xcode [STAR]
content:
@everyone  We are aware of some ongoing issues with discord, preventing some peoples access to this server. I trust the issues will be resolved very soon. Please let your guild mates know its a technical issue on discords side. 

https://downdetector.ca/status/discord/
